prompt: An authentic Korean-style Instagram bathroom mirror selfie, shot on a smartphone by a 25-year-old East Asian woman inside a luxury hotel suite. Her figure is mature and naturally hourglass with healthy, realistic proportions: soft fuller upper-body curves, a naturally narrow waist, and an overall rounded feminine silhouette. She carries the styled aura of a Korean influencer, long voluminous wavy brown hair flowing naturally, subtle refined makeup, fair clear skin with a natural glow, gentle features, naturally rosy lips, eyes softly lowered toward the phone screen, a calm mature expression. She wears a minimal chic triangle swimsuit in a black-and-white floral print that follows her natural curves with soft fabric tension and drape. She sits cross-legged on the clean floor of a modern luxury hotel bathroom, casually snapping the selfie. One leg tilts slightly toward the camera as a soft foreground, body angled toward the mirror, one hand holding a black phone that partially covers her face, the other hand resting naturally on the floor, a real lived-in relaxed post-vacation pose. Setting: a minimalist luxury hotel bathroom with beige tiled walls, a black vanity cabinet, a dark wooden door, warm soft interior lighting, low contrast, and a natural sense of space. Vertical 3:4 framing, close-range phone-selfie viewpoint, slight natural wide-angle distortion, subject filling the main frame, mirror-reflection composition. Overall an authentic phone-shot texture: Korean Instagram-selfie aesthetic, lightly edited in social-media style yet keeping real skin texture, soft focus, mild film grain, natural warm light and shadow, no over-smoothing, no plastic skin, a strong life-record quality with a refined real luxury daily mood. Real human proportions, naturally mature feminine beauty, luxury hotel staycation life-record style.
